title: Public support for carbon pricing policies and revenue recycling options: a systematic review and meta-analysis of the survey literature
authors: Farah Mohammadzadeh Valencia, Cornelia Mohren, Anjali Ramakrishnan, Marlene Merchert, Jan C. Minx, Jan Christoph Steckel

tax_mentions.context: Systematic review/meta-analysis of survey support for carbon taxes with revenue recycling options.
Includes survey evidence on support for fossil fuel taxes and related fuel-price policies.

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: It is subsidy removal, not a tax on carbon or fuel.

inclusion_reason: Systematic review and meta-analysis directly analyzes survey support for carbon taxes and fossil fuel taxes, including how revenue recycling affects acceptability.
